steps.title: Identify the timeline of Round Table references
steps.content: The passage is explicit: “no source before 1155 includes references to the famous Round Table.” Since Preiddeu Annwfn was composed around 900, it predates 1155 and therefore contains no Round Table references.

steps.title: Apply the timeline to Malory's sources
steps.content: Since Preiddeu Annwfn predates 1155, it contains no Round Table references—so Malory could not have sourced his Round Table material from it. Choices A, C, and D each venture unsupported claims about accuracy, awareness, and content similarities. That matches choice B — B is correct.
